title: usecase.Recover (roll forward orphaned ops) (CRITICAL PATH)
acceptance_criteria: Reads OpLog.Pending; for each, resumes from the next undone step (§6 Layer 6).
Auto-invoked by task list/task next when an in-flight op is detected.
Failed recovery surfaces in task validate.
Output: { recovered: [{ op_id, kind, steps_completed, steps_skipped }], failed: [...] }.
